  • Changelog

Filter a MAF dataframe by gene name

Source: R/gam_utils.R
filter_maf_gene.name.Rd

Filter a MAF dataframe by gene name

Usage

filter_maf_gene.name(maf, genes, gene.col = "Hugo_Symbol", ...)

Arguments

maf

A MAF dataframe

genes

Vector of gene names to retain

gene.col

Column name containing gene symbols

...

Additional arguments passed to filter_maf_column

Value

Filtered MAF dataframe.

Examples

data(luad_maf, package = "SelectSim")
filter_maf_gene.name(luad_maf, genes = c("TP53", "KRAS"))
#>        Chromosome Start_Position End_Position Hugo_Symbol
#> 34             12       25398285     25398285        KRAS
#> 313            12       25398285     25398285        KRAS
#> 725            12       25398285     25398285        KRAS
#> 1807           17        7577123      7577123        TP53
